prompt: Create a minimalist contemporary ink-and-watercolor illustration on an off-white vertical paper canvas. In the center, show exactly 3 small ancient Chinese court ladies riding exactly 3 white horses from left to right, rendered as tiny delicate black-ink line figures with soft pink and coral robes. The riders have black hair in high traditional buns and simplified facial details; the horses have black manes, black tails, thin legs, and lightly sketched bridles, with a graceful procession rhythm. Surround them with large translucent abstract watercolor washes: one broad pale pink cloud band across the lower middle, one smaller pink oval wash at lower left, one soft coral-pink wash sweeping across the upper left, one large misty green wash in the lower right, one pale sage-green wash across the upper right, one darker teal-green rounded wash in the top-right corner, and one light yellow-green circular glow near the top center. Add scattered dark green ink speckles near the top-left and upper center-right, a few tiny pink and green dots in the open white space, and a thin vertical reddish drip line descending near the lower-left edge. Keep the composition airy with abundant negative space, soft bleeding watercolor edges, subtle paper grain, no border, no text, no watermark. Style: refined East Asian-inspired modern watercolor, poetic, ethereal, collectible art print, delicate ink strokes, pastel palette of soft rose pink, misty teal green, and cream paper, with the central procession small and crisp against large abstract washes.
